title: 2026 Oscars Best Cinematography Predictions - Variety
text: The piece, written by Clayton Davis and published January 29, 2026, focuses on Oscar cinematography contenders for the 98th Academy Awards ceremony (March 15, 2026). The article asks whether cinematographer Autumn Durald Arkapaw will make history in the cinematography category in connection with the film Sinners, directed by Ryan Coogler. Featured films include Sinners (with cinematography by Durald Arkapaw), Train Dreams (featuring Joel Edgerton, distributed by Netflix), and Frankenstein (Netflix). Final Oscar voting will take place from Feb. 26 to Mar. 5 with the ceremony hosted by Conan O'Brien.
